title: Verify two allocation forms over one edge model: allocatedTo-on-source clears MG041/MG081 + derives allocatedFrom; type-less legacy features are edges; E503 unresolved; W503 redundant duplicate.

title: Verify the applies-when CLI: set by feature id or path, E209/E228 refusal, void-model bad-config check on set, clear, dry-run.

title: Verify the --where custom-field query: exact, regex, list-membership, presence, and bad-predicate exit.

title: Verify that the tool accepts the model directory via -m and --model arguments.
Verify that the tool reports an error to stderr and exits non-zero for invalid model paths.

title: Verify detailed per-command help: help <cmd>, <cmd> --help, the index, and unknown handling.
Verify --agent-instructions topic: magicgrid prints the MagicGrid prompt; no topic prints the general prompt; an unknown topic exits non-zero; works with no model directory.
Verify version reporting via --version, -V, and the version subcommand (exit 0, no model dir).

scenarios.name: works from a directory with no model or .syscribe.toml

title: Verify the clap top-level router: unknown command rejected (non-zero, no model needed); known commands, man-page help, and version preserved.

title: Verify that E200, E201, and E209 are emitted for Configuration and appliesWhen violations.

legacy selections: under a feature model warns
features: map configuration does not warn
